ingredients.edit_prompt: Take the provided Huesito skeleton and dress it: add a red hooded sweatshirt and dark pants. Keep the EXACT skull, big round brown eyes and tall slim proportions. Plain neutral grey background, full body, centered, no scene, no text.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Establishing plate of a quiet city park at golden hour, green grass, a few trees, a paved path and a wooden bench — EMPTY: no people, warm soft light, no text. Clean wide background plate. Photoreal, 9:16.

visual.image_prompt: Using the provided Huesito in his red hoodie, on the provided park plate: medium shot, Huesito sitting on the wooden bench looking calmly at the camera, golden hour light, vertical framing.
visual.animation_prompt: Huesito tilts his head slightly and the leaves sway gently in the breeze.

visual.image_prompt: Using the provided Huesito in his red hoodie: close-up portrait, Huesito standing on the park path, looking up at the sky with a curious expression, golden hour, vertical framing.
visual.animation_prompt: Huesito slowly raises his head to look upward as the camera pushes in.
